post.description: Applies tag deltas to the given assets: adds addTagIds, removes removeTagIds, and leaves tags not mentioned in either array untouched. Adds apply before removes, so a tag id present in both arrays ends up removed. Already-present adds and already-absent removes are skipped silently; the response reports counts of assignments actually inserted and deleted.

put.description: Replaces each listed asset's tags with exactly the given tag list: any tag not in tagIds is removed from the asset, and an empty tagIds array strips the listed assets of all tags. Assets already matching the target are left untouched; the response reports counts of assignments actually inserted and deleted. To apply add/remove deltas that leave unmentioned tags in place, use POST /content-pool/assets/tags instead.

patch.description: Renames a tag's value everywhere it is assigned; the type is immutable. The new value is trimmed and must be 1-20 characters. Renaming to a value already used by another tag of the same type fails with a conflict, so two tags cannot be silently merged. Renaming a tag to its current value succeeds without changes.

post.description: Attaches a CPM, pay-per-submission, or pay-per-milestone reward structure to a reward campaign. The structure activates immediately by default (pass activate=false to stage it as a draft); activating on a running campaign backfills existing submissions unless backfillExisting=false. A campaign holds at most one CPM structure at a time — creating a second is refused until the existing one is settled. Activating a CPM is also refused while the campaign has submissions pending review: payouts are computed at review time under the active CPM rate, so pending submissions must be approved or rejected first to keep that rate unambiguous. Money fields are integer cents.

activate.description: Activate the structure immediately. Pass false to stage it as a draft.

amountCents.description: CPM rate: clipper payout in integer cents per 1000 views.

backfillExisting.description: When activating on a running campaign, bind the structure to existing submissions.

budgetCents.description: Clipper payout budget in integer cents (100 = $1.00).

cpmMaxPayoutCents.description: Cap on the payout a single clip can earn, in integer cents.

cpmMinViewThreshold.description: Views a clip must reach before it earns anything.

platforms.description: Restricts the structure to clips on these platforms. Omit to cover every campaign platform.

activate.description: Activate the structure immediately. Pass false to stage it as a draft.

amountCents.description: Flat clipper payout per approved submission, in integer cents.

backfillExisting.description: When activating on a running campaign, bind the structure to existing submissions.

budgetCents.description: Clipper payout budget in integer cents (100 = $1.00).

platforms.description: Restricts the structure to clips on these platforms. Omit to cover every campaign platform.

activate.description: Activate the structure immediately. Pass false to stage it as a draft.

amountCents.description: One-shot bonus paid when the threshold is crossed, in integer cents.

backfillExisting.description: When activating on a running campaign, bind the structure to existing submissions.

budgetCents.description: Clipper payout budget in integer cents (100 = $1.00).

platforms.description: Restricts the structure to clips on these platforms. Omit to cover every campaign platform.

ppmThresholdValue.description: Threshold the metric must reach. Bigint internally; pass an integer or a numeric string.

committedBudgetCents.description: Disbursed plus pending or projected budget obligations.

ppmThresholdValue.description: Bigint internally; serialized as a numeric string.
